human_task_name: SynAIpse CC2 disposition-aware stop Worker verification
objective: Verify patch 98d650c6 after restricting non-blocking stop semantics to optional outcomes actually projected into contextUnknowns without changing source or Git state.

decision_frame.value: Keep the nine-code v1 context-failure taxonomy semantically truthful while preserving optional contextUnknowns compatibility.
decision_frame.why_now: Fresh Worker review rejected 8b0a2dca because lifecycle, access, and stale failures marked optional still block but were given continuation conditions.
acceptance_criteria: HEAD is 8aa5e406f49c84ba04fa39e628d9d8f5a3ea35c8 and staged patch SHA-256 is 98d650c6c407143f4386396ac675cdd3f000849c373630319e9e1efb28b5c801.
Only optional missing, provider-unavailable, and unresolved-host-path outcomes continue as explicit unknowns; lifecycle, access, and stale outcomes remain blocking.
Focused tests, schema validation, boundary guard, and TypeScript pass; release-5 through release-8 findings are explicitly dispositioned.
dependencies: Rejected Worker result release8-worker-result.json SHA-256 2bced9ce0fd13a7cc705f2aa02753bb0e6d344b1ab37a1dc0b8938b7e61d8e10 and /private/tmp/coding-harness-synaipse-cc2-next/.harness/implementation-notes/2026-07-20-synaipse-cc2-optional-missing-contract-ratification.md.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Prevent semantically false recovery instructions at the public decision boundary.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One read-only Worker verification of the exact staged patch.

review_plan.adversarial_review_rationale: The patch changes a public versioned decision envelope and compatibility behavior.

non_goals: Do not edit source, stage, commit, push, mutate a PR, or make hosted/readiness claims.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/synaipse/context-plane.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/dev/validate-harness-decision-failures.test.ts

delegated_decision_rights: Run read-only verification and write only declared Worker artifacts.
